name: salesforce-interview
description: Salesforce DX project powered by sfpowerkit

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: sf apex run test --test-level RunLocalTests --synchronous --result-format human
scripts.scratchorg:create: sf org create scratch --definition-file config/project-scratch-def.json --set-default --duration-days 30 --alias dev
scripts.scratchorg:setup: npm run scratchorg:create && npm run scratchorg:push && npm run scratchorg:open
